title: EIL – Junior Assistant, Engineer and More – 22 Posts

basic_details.job_title: EIL Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 22 Junior Assistant, Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Engineers India Limited (EIL) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 22 Junior Assistant, Engineer and More Posts. Candidates with B.B.A, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, MBA/PGDM Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 09-05-2026, and closes on 25-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through EIL website, engineersindia.com.
basic_details.post_name: Junior Assistant, Engineer and More – 22 Posts

age_limit.age_details: IInd AC Sleeper rail fare (by shortest route)

selection_process: Interview (Senior Manager / Manager / Engineer) | Skill Test (Jr. Draftsman / Junior Assistant)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the career link on EIL's official website http://www.engineersindia.com. Online submission will be permitted between 0000 hrs on 09.05.2026 till 2359 hrs on 25.05.2026. A candidate can apply for one position only — in case of multiple applications, the latest one shall be considered as final and older applications shall be rejected without notice. Applications once submitted cannot be withdrawn.
